# `!template`

**Category:** files

Render a local template (resolved through the templates/ lookup) with variables and write the result to a remote path. Idempotent via SHA-512 of rendered output.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src` | string | yes | Local template filename (looked up under the templates directory). |
| `dest` | path | yes | Remote destination path for the rendered file. |
| `attributes` | map | no | File attributes applied to the rendered file: owner, group, mode. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !template
  src: nginx.conf.j2
  dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
```
